channel.title: Benjamin Robinson - Personal Website & Blog
channel.description: Recent content on Benjamin Robinson - Personal Website & Blog

item.title: Grinding the Mocks: A Theory of Mock Drafts
item.description: The Nostalgia Factor As a person who likes to think deeply about things and was simultaneously consuming my third straight day of television coverage of the National Football League draft, I had the following thou”ght: why do I care so much about the NFL Draft?“” After searching long and hard for an answer, I came to think that one reason I’m so interested in the draft is because at its heart, the draft can be a source for optimism in a world where the team you root for might not always win on the field (heck they may rarely win on the field!
